title: englerodendron conchyliophorum
intro: Englerodendron conchyliophorum, also known as the Conch shell tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae, native to tropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering relief from pain and inflammation. Englerodendron conchyliophorum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
